## What Changed

- Describe the user-facing or developer-facing changes.
- Link related ticket(s) if available.

## Why This Change

- Explain why this change is needed and what problem it solves.

## Risk Assessment

- **Risk level:** low / medium / high
- **Primary risk area:** UI, auth, navigation, build pipeline, release, etc.
- **Rollback plan:** how to safely revert if needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run doctor`
- [ ] `bun run build:web`
- [ ] Screenshots or screen recording added for UI changes
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data introduced

## Release Notes

- Describe what should be included in release notes (or write "none").
